purpose: Public-safe mutation cases for caller-provided source-handle redactions across synthetic domains.
boundary: All cases are synthetic and keep source handles as opaque retrieval hints only.
The mutations stress formatting changes around handles, not source resolution, storage, or policy semantics.
Real source retrieval, source contents, domain interpretation, approval, retention, routing, and policy stay caller-owned.

domains.intent: Check that finance-adjacent review notes still redact opaque handles when punctuation or structured formatting mutates around them.

cases.name: parenthetical handle mutation
cases.input: A synthetic budget caveat (source:finance-sandbox/variance-note-a) still needs a caller-owned check.
cases.expected: A synthetic budget caveat ([Source handle redacted]) still needs a caller-owned check.

cases.name: comma-delimited handle mutation
cases.input: Trace source:finance-sandbox/forecast-b, source:finance-sandbox/risk-note-c, then keep the decision caller-owned.
cases.expected: Trace [Source handle redacted], [Source handle redacted], then keep the decision caller-owned.

cases.name: yaml-like handle mutation
cases.input:
evidence:
  handle: source:finance-sandbox/packet-d
  caveat: synthetic only
cases.expected:
evidence:
  handle: [Source handle redacted]
  caveat: synthetic only

domains.intent: Check that household-adjacent notes stay generic while mutation cases cover quoted handles, list items, and inline labels.

cases.name: quoted handle mutation
cases.input: Keep "source:household-sandbox/layout-note-a" as a synthetic retrieval hint only.
cases.expected: Keep "[Source handle redacted]" as a synthetic retrieval hint only.

cases.name: markdown checklist mutation
cases.input: - Review source:household-sandbox/capture-b before any caller-owned follow-up.
cases.expected: - Review [Source handle redacted] before any caller-owned follow-up.

domains.intent: Check that coordination-style notes redact mutated handles without implying package-owned routing or approval semantics.

cases.name: braced handle mutation
cases.input: The synthetic coordination note cites {source:org-sandbox/decision-a} for traceability only.
cases.expected: The synthetic coordination note cites {[Source handle redacted]} for traceability only.

cases.name: slash-separated handle mutation
cases.input: Compare source:org-sandbox/status-b / source:org-sandbox/follow-up-c only if the caller verifies the split correctly.
cases.expected: Compare [Source handle redacted] / [Source handle redacted] only if the caller verifies the split correctly.

domains.intent: Check that creative review notes still redact handles when the surrounding text mutates into lightweight markup or revision shorthand.

cases.name: backticked handle mutation
cases.input: Keep `source:creative-sandbox/brief-a` opaque inside the synthetic critique note.
cases.expected: Keep `[Source handle redacted]` opaque inside the synthetic critique note.
